full_text:
Bing Xuan (Wenbiao) 邴玄 (文表)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Bing Xuan (邴玄), styledWenbiao (文表), was born in Danyang. Succeeded Bing Liang in his post. His daughter married Sun Deng. Mourned by Sun Quan. Bing Xuan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Bing Xuan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
